channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Wall Street gains access to new catastrophe models designed to predict wars
item.description: Disaster modelers are adapting their methods to help investors, banks, and insurers forecast military conflicts.

item.title: SpaceX surge boosts fortune of Saudi billionaire Prince Alwaleed
item.description: Prince Alwaleed's Kingdom Holding Co. surged after SpaceX's first trading day gains increased the value of his stake.

item.title: Trump warns Israel and Iran not to undermine ceasefire deal that he says will bring peace to Lebanon
item.description: Trump has urged Netanyahu to halt heavy strikes on Lebanon as a deal nears, but the prime minister has resisted.

item.title: Iran demonstrated it can close the Strait of Hormuz, but the U.S. is loudly asserting its ability to reopen it
item.description: Hegseth described the U.S. naval blockade in Iran as "impenetrable," noting that 125 million barrels of oil have left the Gulf, demonstrating U.S. control.
